records.question: Which customers named Leslie live in New Haven, CT with phone 2035559545, who work with sales rep Foon Yue having extension x2248, and whose office at postal code 10022 has addressline2 apt. 5A?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customernumber FROM customers
JOIN employees ON customers.salesrepemployeenumber = employees.employeenumber
JOIN offices ON employees.officecode = offices.officecode
WHERE employees.extension = 'x2248' AND customers.city = 'New Haven' AND customers.contactfirstname = 'Leslie' AND offices.postalcode = '10022' AND customers.phone = '2035559545' AND customers.state = 'CT' AND offices.addressline2 = 'apt. 5A' AND employees.firstname = 'Foon Yue'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT customers.customerNumber
FROM customers
JOIN employees ON customers.salesRepEmployeeNumber = employees.employeeNumber
JOIN offices ON employees.officeCode = offices.officeCode
WHERE customers.contactFirstName = 'Leslie'
  AND customers.city = 'New Haven'
  AND customers.state = 'CT'
  AND customers.phone = '2035559545'
  AND employees.firstName = 'Foon'
  AND employees.lastName = 'Yue'
  AND employees.extension = 'x2248'
  AND offices.postalCode = '10022'
  AND offices.addressLine2 = 'apt. 5A'

records.question: Which customers have the address exactly 265, boulevard Charonne and are linked through their sales rep’s manager to an office?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customernumber FROM customers
JOIN employees ON customers.salesrepemployeenumber = employees.employeenumber
JOIN employees AS employees__1 ON employees.reportsto = employees__1.employeenumber
JOIN offices ON employees__1.officecode = offices.officecode
WHERE customers.addressline1 = '265, boulevard Charonne'

SELECT customers.customerNumber
FROM customers
JOIN employees AS salesRep ON customers.salesRepEmployeeNumber = salesRep.employeeNumber
JOIN employees AS manager ON salesRep.reportsTo = manager.employeeNumber
JOIN offices ON manager.officeCode = offices.officeCode
WHERE customers.addressLine1 = '265, boulevard Charonne'

JOIN employees ON customers.salesrepemployeenumber = employees.employeenumber
WHERE employees.lastname = 'Jones' AND customers.postalcode = '4110' AND customers.customername = 'Baane Mini Imports' AND customers.city = 'Stavern'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT customers.customerNumber
FROM customers
JOIN employees ON customers.salesRepEmployeeNumber = employees.employeeNumber
WHERE customers.customerName = 'Baane Mini Imports'
  AND customers.city = 'Stavern'
  AND customers.postalCode = '4110'
  AND employees.lastName = 'Jones'

records.question: Which customers named King Kong Collectables, Co. have Mike as the contact first name, phone number +852 2251 1555, an address at Bank of China Tower, and are located in Hong Kong?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customernumber FROM customers
JOIN employees ON customers.salesrepemployeenumber = employees.employeenumber
JOIN offices ON employees.officecode = offices.officecode
WHERE customers.customername = 'King Kong Collectables, Co.' AND customers.phone = '+852 2251 1555' AND customers.addressline1 = 'Bank of China Tower' AND customers.contactfirstname = 'Mike' AND customers.country = 'Hong Kong'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT customers.customerNumber
FROM customers
WHERE customerName = 'King Kong Collectables, Co.'
  AND contactFirstName = 'Mike'
  AND phone = '+852 2251 1555'
  AND addressLine1 = 'Bank of China Tower'
  AND city = 'Hong Kong'

records.question: Which customers named Michael have a sales representative with extension x2248, whose last name is Tseng and email is ftseng@classicmodelcars.com, reporting to an employee at the 100 Market Street office with phone +1 650 219 4782 and postal code 94080?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customernumber FROM customers
JOIN employees ON customers.salesrepemployeenumber = employees.employeenumber
JOIN employees AS employees__1 ON employees.reportsto = employees__1.employeenumber
JOIN offices ON employees__1.officecode = offices.officecode
WHERE employees.extension = 'x2248' AND offices.addressline1 = '100 Market Street' AND offices.phone = '+1 650 219 4782' AND employees.email = 'ftseng@classicmodelcars.com' AND employees.lastname = 'Tseng' AND customers.contactfirstname = 'Michael' AND offices.postalcode = '94080'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT customers.customerNumber
FROM customers
JOIN employees AS salesRep ON customers.salesRepEmployeeNumber = salesRep.employeeNumber
JOIN employees AS manager ON salesRep.reportsTo = manager.employeeNumber
JOIN offices ON salesRep.officeCode = offices.officeCode
WHERE customers.contactFirstName = 'Michael'
  AND salesRep.extension = 'x2248'
  AND salesRep.lastName = 'Tseng'
  AND salesRep.email = 'ftseng@classicmodelcars.com'
  AND offices.addressLine1 = '100 Market Street'
  AND offices.phone = '+1 650 219 4782'
  AND offices.postalCode = '94080'

records.question: Which customers named 'Online Diecast Creations Co.' located in state 'NH' have a sales representative employee, have placed orders with status exactly 'Shipped', and have recorded payments?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customernumber FROM customers
JOIN employees ON customers.salesrepemployeenumber = employees.employeenumber
JOIN orders ON customers.customernumber = orders.customernumber
JOIN payments ON customers.customernumber = payments.customernumber
WHERE customers.customername = 'Online Diecast Creations Co.' AND orders.status = 'Shipped' AND customers.state = 'NH'

SELECT customers.customerNumber
FROM customers
JOIN employees ON customers.salesRepEmployeeNumber = employees.employeeNumber
JOIN orders ON customers.customerNumber = orders.customerNumber
JOIN payments ON customers.customerNumber = payments.customerNumber
WHERE customers.customerName = 'Online Diecast Creations Co.'
  AND customers.state = 'NH'
  AND orders.status = 'Shipped'

records.question: What customers have contact last name MacKinlay, phone number 64-9-3763555, and a credit limit of 77700.0, whose sales representative is Peter Marsh, and who have orders required on or before 2004-06-22?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customernumber FROM customers
JOIN employees ON customers.salesrepemployeenumber = employees.employeenumber
JOIN orders ON customers.customernumber = orders.customernumber
WHERE orders.requireddate <= '2004-06-22' AND customers.phone = '64-9-3763555' AND customers.creditlimit = 77700.0 AND employees.lastname = 'Marsh' AND employees.firstname = 'Peter' AND customers.contactlastname = 'MacKinlay'

SELECT customers.customerNumber
FROM customers
JOIN employees ON customers.salesRepEmployeeNumber = employees.employeeNumber
JOIN orders ON customers.customerNumber = orders.customerNumber
WHERE customers.contactLastName = 'MacKinlay'
  AND customers.phone = '64-9-3763555'
  AND customers.creditLimit = 77700.0
  AND employees.firstName = 'Peter'
  AND employees.lastName = 'Marsh'
  AND orders.requiredDate <= '2004-06-22'
